---
title:  Lecture 10
subtitle:  NYT Graph Recreation - Dashboards
format: stat198slides-revealjs
---

# Agenda

- NYT Graph Recreation
- Dashboards lecture
- Project logistics

# NYT Graph Recreation

Article: [Presidential Election Results 2020: Biden Wins](https://www.nytimes.com/interactive/2020/11/03/us/elections/results-president.html)

## Map

We will recreate a simplified version of this
![](images/vote-map.png)
